channel.title: Forensic on Classroom
channel.description: Recent content in Forensic on Classroom

item.title: Forensic Tools
item.description: Curated reference list of digital forensic tools for disk analysis, memory forensics, network capture, and incident response investigations.

item.title: Volatility Installation in Linux
item.description: Step-by-step guide to installing Volatility 2 on Linux for memory forensics, including dependencies, Python setup, and verification.
